raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {"n": 30, "column": "left", "text": "Weenn Ahſi/ par Salih-
dſinaſchannu par jums."},
    {"n": 31, "column": "left", "text": "Pahri pahr to nemitteja-
imu Dedsamu-Uppuri ar winna Ehdamu-Uppuri/ buhs jums
ſchahs Leetas fataitiht/ tahm buhs jums bes Wainas buht/
lihds ar winnu Dsernamu-Upp-
purreim."},
    {"n": 1, "column": "left", "text": "Ta XXIX. Nodalla.
No ta ſeptita Mehnes jeb Trummetschanas,
Ewehtkeem: 1. No tahs Salihdsinascha-
nas Deenas: 7. Un no teem Leevenu Eweht-
keem: 12/17/20/23."},
    {"n": 1, "column": "left", "text": "à lihds arridsan ſeptitâ
Deena/ pirma Meh-
nes Deenâ/ laid jums
weena fwehta Sasaufschanas irr/
ekahdu Kalposchanas Darbu
buhs jums darriht/ ta laid jums
weena Trummetschanas Dee-
na irr."},
    {"n": 2, "column": "left", "text": "Tad buhs jums weenu
Dedsamu-Uppuri tam KUN-
GAM par faldn Smarfchu fa-
taiſht/ weenu Wehrfenu no lee-
leem Lohpeein/ weenn Aunu/
feptix gadſahrtigus Jehrus/kas
bes Wainas buht."},
    {"n": 3, "column": "left", "text": "Un winnu Ehdamu-Upp-
puri no Kweefchu-Milteem/ kas
ar Etji fajaunſti/ trihs Definitus
pee weena Wehrſcha/ un diwi
Definitus pee weena Anna."},
    {"n": 4, "column": "left", "text": "Un weenu Definitu pee
weena Jehra/ lihds ar teem ſeptix
Jehreem."},
    {"n": 5, "column": "left", "text": "Un weenu Ahſi par Greh-"},
    {"n": 6, "column": "right", "text": "Pahri pahr ta Mehne
Dedsamu-Uppuri/un winna E-
damu-Uppuri/ un to nemitteja-
nu Dedsamu-Uppuri/un winna
Ehdamu-Uppuri ar winnu Dse-
xanu-Uppurreim/ pehz ſawa-
Teefas/ par faldn Smarfchu
par Ugguni tam KUNGAM."},
    {"n": 7, "column": "right", "text": "Un Defmitâ (Deenâ)fchi-
ni ſeptitâ Mehneſi/ laid jum-
weena fwehta Sasaufschanairr
jums buhs ſawas Meefas meh-
deht/ ne kahdu Darbu buhs jum-
darriht."},
    {"n": 8, "column": "right", "text": "Bet jums buhs Dedsamu-
Uppuri tam KUNGAM pa-
faldn Smarfchu uppureht/ wee-
nu Wehrfenu no leeleein Lohpeein-
weenu Aunu/ ſeptix gadſahrti-
tigus Jehrus/ teent buhs jum-
bes Wainas buht."},
    {"n": 9, "column": "right", "text": "Un winnu Ehdamu-Uppu-
ri no Kweefchu-Milteem/ ka-
ar Etji fajaunſti/trihs Definitu-
pee weena Wehrſcha/diwi Def-
mitus pee weena Anna."},
    {"n": 10, "column": "right", "text": "Un weenu Definitu pe-
ikweena Jehra/no teem ſepti-
Jehreem."},
    {"n": 11, "column": "right", "text": "Weenn Ahſi par Grehku-
Uppuri/pahri pahr to Grehku-
Uppuri tahs Salihdsinaſchanas
un to nemittejamu Dedsamu-
Uppuri/un winna Ehdamu-
Uppurreem."},
    {"n": 12, "column": "right", "text": "Ta lihds arridsan peeftâ-
padeſmitâ Deena/fchinni ſeptit-
Meh"}
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
